mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) AS courseCount, (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT ce.user_id) FROM course_enrollment ce JOIN course c2 ON ce.course_id = c2.id WHERE c2.teacher_id = #{teacherId} AND ce.is_deleted = 0 AND c2.is_deleted = 0) AS studentCount, IFNULL(SUM(like_count), 0) AS likeCount, IFNULL(SUM(favorite_count), 0) AS favoriteCount, IFNULL(SUM(review_count), 0) AS reviewCount, ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN review_count > 0 THEN avg_score ELSE NULL END), 1) AS avgScore FROM course WHERE teacher_id = #{teacherId} AND is_deleted = 0

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(e.enroll_time, '%Y-%m-%d') AS date, COUNT(DISTINCT e.user_id) AS count FROM course_enrollment e JOIN course c ON c.id = e.course_id AND c.is_deleted = 0 WHERE c.teacher_id = #{teacherId} AND e.is_deleted = 0 AND DATE(e.enroll_time) >= #{startDate} GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(e.enroll_time, '%Y-%m-%d') ORDER BY date ASC

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(e.last_learn_time, '%Y-%m-%d') AS date, COUNT(DISTINCT e.user_id) AS count FROM course_enrollment e JOIN course c ON c.id = e.course_id AND c.is_deleted = 0 WHERE c.teacher_id = #{teacherId} AND e.is_deleted = 0 AND e.last_learn_time IS NOT NULL AND DATE(e.last_learn_time) >= #{startDate} GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(e.last_learn_time, '%Y-%m-%d') ORDER BY date ASC

SELECT r.rating AS rating, COUNT(*) AS count FROM course_review r JOIN course c ON c.id = r.course_id AND c.is_deleted = 0 WHERE c.teacher_id = #{teacherId} AND r.is_deleted = 0 GROUP BY r.rating ORDER BY r.rating DESC
SELECT id AS courseId, course_name AS courseName, student_count AS value FROM course WHERE teacher_id = #{teacherId} AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY student_count DESC LIMIT 10
SELECT id AS courseId, course_name AS courseName, avg_score AS value FROM course WHERE teacher_id = #{teacherId} AND is_deleted = 0 AND review_count > 0 ORDER BY avg_score DESC LIMIT 10
